sentence: 多年未见，他们叙起了旧情。
pinyin: Duō nián wèi jiàn, tāmen xù qǐ le jiùqíng.
english: After many years apart, they reminisced about old times together.

meaning: 1. to estimate; 2. to forecast; 3. prediction; 4. projection
sentence: 专家预估今年的收成会比去年好。
pinyin: Zhuānjiā yùgū jīnnián de shōuchéng huì bǐ qùnián hǎo.
english: Experts forecast that this year's harvest will be better than last year's.

sentence: 她大学主修国际贸易专业。
pinyin: Tā dàxué zhǔxiū guójì màoyì zhuānyè.
english: She majored in international trade at university.

sentence: 他花了三年时间写完这部长篇小说。
pinyin: Tā huāle sān nián shíjiān xiě wán zhè bù chángpiān xiǎoshuō.
english: It took him three years to finish writing this novel.

sentence: 你把那个图标拖到桌面上就行了。
pinyin: Nǐ bǎ nàge túbiāo tuō dào zhuōmiàn shàng jiù xíng le.
english: Just drag that icon onto the desktop.

sentence: 他靠摆摊卖小吃营生。
pinyin: Tā kào bǎitān mài xiǎochī yíngshēng.
english: He earns a living by running a snack stall.

sentence: 周末他喜欢去山里跑越野。
pinyin: Zhōumò tā xǐhuān qù shānlǐ pǎo yuèyě.
english: On weekends he likes to go trail running in the mountains.

meaning: 1. starting point or ending point (in stories etc); 2. end point (math
sentence: 这条线段的两个端点坐标是多少？
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiànduàn de liǎng gè duāndiǎn zuòbiāo shì duōshao?
english: What are the coordinates of the two endpoints of this line segment?

sentence: 这款蓝牙耳机和手机配对很简单。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn lányá ěrjī hé shǒujī pèiduì hěn jiǎndān.
english: Pairing these Bluetooth earphones with a phone is very simple.

sentence: 每个城市都有它的黑暗面。
pinyin: Měi gè chéngshì dōu yǒu tā de hēi àn miàn.
english: Every city has its dark side.

meaning: sense of crisis; acute awareness of looming danger or instability (oft
sentence: 失业让他产生了强烈的危机感。
pinyin: Shīyè ràng tā chǎnshēng le qiángliè de wēi jī gǎn.
english: Losing his job gave him an acute sense of crisis.

sentence: 这家餐厅的顾客满意度很高。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de gùkè mǎn yì dù hěn gāo.
english: This restaurant has a very high customer satisfaction rating.

sentence: 嫌疑人的供词前后矛盾。
pinyin: Xiányírén de gòng cí qiánhòu máodùn.
english: The suspect's confession was full of contradictions.

sentence: 他说他是欧派厨房的忠实用户。
pinyin: Tā shuō tā shì Ōupài chúfáng de zhōngshí yònghù.
english: He said he is a loyal customer of Oupai kitchen cabinets.

sentence: 比赛最后靠点球决出胜负。
pinyin: Bǐsài zuìhòu kào diǎn qiú jué chū shènghū.
english: The match was ultimately decided by a penalty kick shootout.

sentence: 网络兴起以后报业受到了很大冲击。
pinyin: Wǎngluò xīngqǐ yǐhòu bào yè shòudào le hěn dà chōngjī.
english: The newspaper industry took a big hit after the rise of the internet.

sentence: 故事里的知县为人公正廉明。
pinyin: Gùshi lǐ de zhī xiàn wéirén gōngzhèng liánmíng.
english: The county magistrate in the story was fair and honest.

meaning: to be studying (at a school or research institute)
sentence: 她目前是一名在读研究生。
pinyin: Tā mùqián shì yī míng zài dú yánjiūshēng.
english: She is currently an enrolled graduate student.

meaning: to be bold enough to speak out
sentence: 她是公司里少数敢言的员工之一。
pinyin: Tā shì gōngsī lǐ shǎoshù gǎn yán de yuángōng zhī yī.
english: She is one of the few employees at the company bold enough to speak out.

meaning: to write an inscription (poem, remark, autograph etc); an inscription
sentence: 作者在书的扉页上亲笔题字。
pinyin: Zuòzhě zài shū de fēiyè shàng qīnbǐ tí zì.
english: The author personally wrote an inscription on the front page of the book.

sentence: 村里的水塔已经用了三十年了。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de shuǐ tǎ yǐjīng yòng le sānshí nián le.
english: The village water tower has been in use for thirty years.

sentence: 没有凭据，这件事很难说清楚。
pinyin: Méiyǒu píng jù, zhè jiàn shì hěn nán shuō qīngchǔ.
english: Without evidence, it's hard to explain this matter clearly.

sentence: 保险公司按期给付了赔偿金。
pinyin: Bǎoxiǎn gōngsī àn qī jǐ fù le péichángjīn.
english: The insurance company made the compensation payment on schedule.

sentence: 贸易自由化让更多商品进入市场。
pinyin: Màoyì zì yóu huà ràng gèng duō shāngpǐn jìnrù shìchǎng.
english: Trade liberalization has allowed more goods to enter the market.

sentence: 以前邮电局是寄信的唯一地方。
pinyin: Yǐqián yóu diàn jú shì jì xìn de wéiyī dìfāng.
english: In the old days, the post and telecommunications office was the only place to send letters.

sentence: 购物小票上注明了增值税金额。
pinyin: Gòuwù xiǎopiào shàng zhùmíng le zēng zhí shuì jīn'é.
english: The shopping receipt lists the value-added tax amount.

sentence: 两队之间的协和精神让人感动。
pinyin: Liǎng duì zhījiān de xié hé jīngshén ràng rén gǎndòng.
english: The spirit of cooperation between the two teams was very moving.

sentence: 这个社区的暴力犯罪率已经大幅下降。
pinyin: Zhège shèqū de bào lì fàn zuì lǜ yǐjīng dàfú xiàjiàng.
english: The violent crime rate in this community has dropped significantly.

meaning: to sing the original version of a song (as opposed to a cover version)
sentence: 她唱得比原唱还要好听。
pinyin: Tā chàng de bǐ yuán chàng hái yào hǎotīng.
english: She sings even better than the original artist.

sentence: 两国因地缘关系一直往来密切。
pinyin: Liǎng guó yīn dì yuán guānxi yīzhí wǎnglái mìqiē.
english: The two countries have always maintained close ties due to their geographic proximity.

sentence: 广电局出台了新的内容审核规定。
pinyin: Guǎng diàn jú chūtái le xīn de nèiróng shěnhé guīdìng.
english: The radio and television authority issued new content review regulations.

meaning: courseware (abbr. for 課程軟件|课程软件[ke4 cheng2 ruan3 jian4])
sentence: 老师把课件上传到了学校网站。
pinyin: Lǎoshī bǎ kè jiàn shàngchuán dào le xuéxiào wǎngzhàn.
english: The teacher uploaded the courseware to the school website.

meaning: to build up a sequence; a succession of things, each linked to the pre
sentence: 我们玩了一个成语接龙的游戏。
pinyin: Wǒmen wán le yī gè chéngyǔ jiē lóng de yóuxì.
english: We played a game of chained idioms where each one begins with the last character of the previous.

sentence: 草原上的牧民每天赶着牛羊。
pinyin: Cǎoyuán shàng de mùmín měi tiān gǎn zhe niú yáng.
english: The herdsmen on the grassland herd cattle and sheep every day.

sentence: 他在黑暗中摸索找开关。
pinyin: Tā zài hēiàn zhōng mōsuǒ zhǎo kāiguān.
english: He fumbled around in the dark looking for the light switch.

sentence: 这个市场已经趋于饱和，竞争很激烈。
pinyin: Zhège shìchǎng yǐjīng qūyú bǎohé, jìngzhēng hěn jīliè.
english: This market is already nearing saturation, and competition is fierce.

sentence: 双方正在洽谈合作的细节。
pinyin: Shuāng fāng zhèng zài qià tán hé zuò de xì jié.
english: Both sides are currently discussing the details of their cooperation.

meaning: 1. erhua variant of 女孩[nǚ hái]
sentence: 那个女孩儿唱歌特别好听。
pinyin: Nà ge nǚ hái ér chàng gē tè bié hǎo tīng.
english: That girl sings really beautifully.

sentence: 网上有海量的学习资料。
pinyin: Wǎng shang yǒu hǎiliàng de xuéxí zīliào.
english: There is a huge volume of study materials online.

sentence: 这家超市提供免费配送服务。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chāoshì tígōng miǎnfèi pèisòng fúwù.
english: This supermarket offers free delivery service.

sentence: 周末我们去看了一个画展。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù kàn le yī gè huàzhǎn.
english: We went to see an art exhibition over the weekend.

meaning: 1. to seal; 2. to confirm; 3. to corroborate; 4. to verify
sentence: 他说的话印证了我之前的判断。
pinyin: Tā shuō de huà yìnzhèng le wǒ zhīqián de pànduàn.
english: What he said confirmed my earlier judgment.

meaning: 1. age limit; 2. fixed number of years
sentence: 这款手机的保修年限是两年。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī de bǎoxiū niánxiàn shì liǎng nián.
english: The warranty period for this phone is two years.

sentence: 这种病症的主要表现是头痛和发烧。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng bìngzhèng de zhǔyào biǎoxiàn shì tóutòng hé fāshāo.
english: The main symptoms of this illness are headache and fever.

sentence: 早上八点是地铁的高峰期，特别拥挤。
pinyin: Zǎoshang bā diǎn shì dìtiě de gāofēngqī, tèbié yōngjǐ.
english: Eight in the morning is the rush hour for the subway — it's especially crowded.

meaning: 1. to nurse; 2. to look after; 3. to watch over; 4. (old) hospital nur
sentence: 奶奶生病住院，需要有人看护。
pinyin: Nǎinai shēngbìng zhùyuàn, xūyào yǒurén kānhù.
english: Grandma is in the hospital and needs someone to look after her.

sentence: 他三十岁就成了亿万富翁。
pinyin: Tā sānshí suì jiù chéngle yìwàn fùwēng.
english: He became a billionaire by the age of thirty.

sentence: 这双鞋穿了两年，鞋底有些磨损。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié chuānle liǎng nián, xiédǐ yǒuxiē mósǔn.
english: These shoes are two years old and the soles are a bit worn down.

sentence: 同学们正在筹办毕业晚会。
pinyin: Tóngxuémen zhèngzài chóubàn bìyè wǎnhuì.
english: The students are making preparations for the graduation party.

sentence: 她买了一个新鲜菠萝回来。
pinyin: Tā mǎile yī gè xīnxiān bōluó huílái.
english: She bought a fresh pineapple.
